title: Extend event-ledger schema with session_archive_attempted event type
description: Add a new discriminated-union variant `session_archive_attempted` to the EventLedgerEvent schema. Each event carries outcome ∈ {proposed | viability_failed | user_dismissed | skipped_no_signal}, covered_through_ts (latest event ts the archive run covered), candidates_proposed count, and knowledge_proposed_ids array linking to the pending entries produced. Mirrors rc.20 cite_policy_activated and rc.24 cite_contract_policy_activated marker patterns but with structured payload (not a pure marker). Backward-compat free — new variant only added, existing events unaffected.

files.target: discriminated union construction (around L674 where EventLedgerEvent union is built)
files.change: Define new schema sessionArchiveAttemptedEventSchema = z.object({ ...eventLedgerEnvelopeSchema, event_type: z.literal('session_archive_attempted'), outcome: z.enum(['proposed','viability_failed','user_dismissed','skipped_no_signal']), covered_through_ts: z.number().int().nonnegative(), candidates_proposed: z.number().int().nonnegative().default(0), knowledge_proposed_ids: z.array(z.string()).default([]) }). Add it to the EventLedgerEvent discriminated union list. Place definition near other knowledge_* event schemas for locality.

Add 5 cases: (1) session_archive_attempted with outcome='proposed' + non-empty knowledge_proposed_ids roundtrips; (2) outcome='viability_failed' with candidates_proposed=0 roundtrips; (3) outcome='user_dismissed' roundtrips; (4) outcome='skipped_no_signal' roundtrips; (5) unknown outcome enum value rejected by Zod with parse error.

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts L1-L50 (envelope) and L670-L720 (union construction) to confirm current pattern.
Define sessionArchiveAttemptedEventSchema mirroring existing knowledge_*Event schemas — spread envelope, set event_type literal, add structured payload fields.
Append to the EventLedgerEvent discriminated-union list (z.discriminatedUnion or equivalent construction).
Add 5 roundtrip test cases per files[].change directive.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test event-ledger` to confirm all green.

reference.pattern: rc.20 cite_policy_activated + rc.24 cite_contract_policy_activated marker events — pure additive schema extension with backward-compat default
reference.examples: rc.20 TASK-02 added cite_tags + cite_policy_activated; rc.24 TASK-01 added cite_commitments + cite_contract_policy_activated; rc.25 TASK-01 follows same pattern for session_archive_attempted.

rationale.chosen_approach: Single discriminated-union variant with structured payload. outcome enum is closed (4 values exhaustively cover skill state machine). Default-zero numeric + default-empty array fields ensure callers can omit non-essential fields without parse failure.
alternatives_considered: Separate cache file .fabric/.cache/session-archive-status.json (rejected: second state system, rotation conflict)
Object-keyed map at events.jsonl level (rejected: violates per-event row structure)
decision_factors: events.jsonl is single source of truth
fab doctor can grep + audit directly
rationale.tradeoffs: events.jsonl row count grows by ~1 per fabric-archive invocation; negligible vs plan_context (~50-100x lower frequency).

manual_checks: Manually parse a sample event with all 4 outcomes
success_metrics: event-ledger.test.ts adds ≥5 new cases all passing
Discriminated union resolves correctly for session_archive_attempted shape
Unknown outcome value rejected by Zod

criteria: event-ledger.ts outcome enum contains all 4 values: 'proposed','viability_failed','user_dismissed','skipped_no_signal'
event-ledger.test.ts adds ≥5 new test cases (grep for session_archive_attempted)
